script:

$entity.boughtTHData = true 60
TH_CMD getScavengerData
FireAll PopulateOptions
text: The $post speaks freely about $hisOrHer recent discoveries as soon as the credit transfer completes, and the information helps you narrow down your own search.

script:

text: The $post rants fervently about the abominations that $heOrShe has seen in this region. Your subordinates translate $hisOrHer oblique metaphors and scriptural references into meaningful data that helps you narrow down your search.

script:
AddCredits -$th_dataCost
$entity.boughtTHData = true 60
TH_CMD getScavengerData
FireAll PopulateOptions
text: The $post grins, then speaks of $hisOrHer recent exploits. You sift through the ensuing barrage of exaggeration and self-congratulation, pulling out useful details that helps you narrow down your search.

script:
AddCredits -$th_dataCost
$entity.boughtTHData = true 60
TH_CMD getScavengerData
FireAll PopulateOptions
text: The $post outlines patrol reports, filed salvage claims, and registry updates. Your officers compile the relevant entries into a concise summary of likely points of interest.

script:
AddCredits -$th_dataCost
$entity.boughtTHData = true 60

text: The $post's account is measured and reflective. Your subordinates translate its theological framing into practical direction for your hunt.

script:

$entity.boughtTHData = true 60

FireAll PopulateOptions
text: What follows is a concise briefing from the $post, supported by precise timestamps and positional data. Your staff compiles the relevant leads.
$HeOrShe seems disappointed by your denial, but eventually shrugs it off. "Anything else?"

script:
$hassle_didAlready = true 0
$hassleComplete = true
MakeOtherFleetPreventDisengage hassle true
unset $ignorePlayerCommRequests
$thRestrictConv = true 0
$entity.thRestrictConv = true 0
$thRestrictMadeHostile = false 0
HailPlayer

text:
The comms stabilize. The $post appears on-screen, face hard-set.

"Independent fleet: you are operating in a restricted system under Hegemony emergency authority. Cut your drive and prepare for inspection. Resistance will be treated as hostile action."

A beat. "Power down weapons and stand by for boarding teams."

The link snaps to life. A $post leans into frame with practiced impatience.

"This system is under League restriction. You will heave to and submit to an inspection. If you're here on legitimate business, you'll have nothing to worry about."

"Don't make this difficult, captain."

A $post appears on the comm, $hisOrHer expression severe but controlled.

"Captain. By order of the Church, this system is restricted. You will submit to inspection and certify your fleet is not carrying proscribed devices or materials."

"May Ludd guide you to wisdom. Do not test our patience."

script:
$entity.ignorePlayerCommRequests = true 7
MakeOtherFleetPreventDisengage hassle false
FireAll THRestrictedOptions
text:
The comms flicker and stabilize. The $post clears $hisOrHer throat.

"Captain. This system is designated restricted under Hegemony authority. I am requesting your cooperation with an inspection."

A quick glance off-screen. "Voluntary compliance will be noted."

script:
$entity.ignorePlayerCommRequests = true 7
MakeOtherFleetPreventDisengage hassle false
FireAll THRestrictedOptions
text:
The $post appears, posture a touch uncertain.

"Captain. This system is restricted. I'd prefer to handle this professionally. Cut speed and submit to an inspection so we can both get on with our day."

script:
$entity.ignorePlayerCommRequests = true 7
MakeOtherFleetPreventDisengage hassle false
FireAll THRestrictedOptions
text:
A $post appears, voice measured.

"Captain. This system is restricted. I ask that you submit to inspection so we may confirm there is no grave impropriety aboard your ships."

A $post appears on the comm.

"This system is restricted. Cut your drive and prepare for inspection. Resistance will be treated as hostile action."

script:
$entity.ignorePlayerCommRequests = true 7
MakeOtherFleetPreventDisengage hassle false
FireAll THRestrictedOptions
text:
A $post appears on the comm.

"Captain. This system is restricted. I request your cooperation with an inspection."

options: thRestrict_Refuse:"No, you have no right to do this."
thRestrict_Refuse:"With that fleet? You're not in a position to make demands."
cutCommLinkNoText:Cut the comm link and power up weapons

script:
ShowImageVisual quartermaster
MakeOtherFleetPreventDisengage hassle false
MakeOtherFleetAggressive thRestrictedInspection false 2
MakeOtherFleetHostile thRestrictedInspection false 2
ApplyCRDamage $entity.fleetPoints 0.10 1 "Restricted inspection"
text:
Boarding teams move through your ships with brisk efficiency.

Even so, there’s plenty of careless handling, unnecessary scans, and rough treatment of sensitive components. Your crews bite their tongues and log the damage.

After a tense interval, the inspectors withdraw.

script:
ShowImageVisual quartermaster
MakeOtherFleetPreventDisengage hassle false
MakeOtherFleetAggressive thRestrictedInspection false 2
MakeOtherFleetHostile thRestrictedInspection false 2
ApplyCRDamage $entity.fleetPoints 0.20 1 "Restricted inspection"
text:
The inspection teams are thorough to the point of sabotage, hatches forced, compartments dumped, and diagnostic probes jammed into systems that should never be opened, much less subject to active scans.

Your officers protest; the response is bureaucratic stonewalling and thinly veiled threats. The teams take their time, ensuring you feel every second of it.

Eventually, they withdraw, leaving your maintenance crews thoroughly inconvenienced.

"Thank you for your cooperation, captain," the $post says, voice clipped.

"You are cleared to proceed. Remain outside restricted zones and you won't be troubled again."
"You're done here," the officer says. "Move along, and don't come back to restricted space without authorization."

script:
RemoveOption thRestrict_Refuse
$thRestrictFailedToRefuse = true 0
$thRestrictMadeHostile = true 0
MakeOtherFleetHostile thRestrictedInspection true 3
MakeOtherFleetAggressive thRestrictedInspection true 3
FireAll THRestrictedOptions
text:
The $post’s eyes narrow.

"Your refusal is noted. You are now in violation of a restricted-space security order under Hegemony authority."

"Last warning, captain: power down and submit, or we will enforce compliance."

script:
RemoveOption thRestrict_Refuse
$thRestrictFailedToRefuse = true 0
MakeOtherFleetPreventDisengage hassle false
MakeOtherFleetAggressive thRestrictedInspection false 2
MakeOtherFleetHostile thRestrictedInspection false 2
text:
The $post’s expression tightens, uncertainty flashing across $hisOrHer face.

"Your refusal is… noted, Captain."

A short pause. "This system remains restricted. You are advised to depart immediately."

The $post cuts the connection without waiting for a reply.

script:
RemoveOption thRestrict_Refuse
$thRestrictFailedToRefuse = true 0
$thRestrictMadeHostile = true 0
MakeOtherFleetHostile thRestrictedInspection true 3
MakeOtherFleetAggressive thRestrictedInspection true 3
FireAll THRestrictedOptions
text:
The $post exhales sharply, $hisOrHer look turning flat.

"Alright. Then you’re choosing to violate a League restriction order in open space."

You catch a glimpse of hurried movement on their bridge. The $post’s expression does not change.

"Last warning: heave to and submit, or we’re doing this the hard way."

script:
RemoveOption thRestrict_Refuse
$thRestrictFailedToRefuse = true 0
MakeOtherFleetPreventDisengage hassle false
MakeOtherFleetAggressive thRestrictedInspection false 2
MakeOtherFleetHostile thRestrictedInspection false 2
text:
The $post stares for a moment, then forces a tight smile.

"Sure. Fine. Your call."

A quiet aside, barely audible: "We’re not dying for paperwork."

Back on comms: "This system’s restricted. Don’t make trouble and we won’t either."

script:
RemoveOption thRestrict_Refuse
$thRestrictFailedToRefuse = true 0
$thRestrictMadeHostile = true 0
MakeOtherFleetHostile thRestrictedInspection true 3
MakeOtherFleetAggressive thRestrictedInspection true 3
FireAll THRestrictedOptions
text:
The $post closes $hisOrHer eyes for a brief moment.

"Then you place yourself in defiance of a lawful restriction, and in suspicion of grave sin."

$HisOrHer tone hardens. "If you will not submit, we will compel compliance."

script:
RemoveOption thRestrict_Refuse
$thRestrictFailedToRefuse = true 0
MakeOtherFleetPreventDisengage hassle false
MakeOtherFleetAggressive thRestrictedInspection false 2
MakeOtherFleetHostile thRestrictedInspection false 2
text:
The $post’s gaze flicks to $hisOrHer tactical displays and lingers there a moment too long.

"Then… may Ludd judge the truth in your heart, captain."

A controlled breath. "We will not shed blood here today. But understand this: the system is restricted. Depart, and do not return."

text:
"Refusal noted," the officer says coldly. "You are now in violation of a restricted-space order."

You catch a glimpse of hurried movement on their bridge.

"Last warning: power down and submit, or we will enforce compliance."

The comm link cuts out.
An orbital station is preventing survey operations. It will need to be dealt with first.

id: # Ruin Excavation - defender fleet comm link

script:
SetStoryOption thExcConvince 1 thExcConvinceDefender ui_char_spent_story_point "Convinced excavation fleet to withdraw"
ShowDefaultVisual
text:
You establish a comm link with the fleet commander. A nervous voice responds:

"We're under contract to guard this operation. I'd advise you to move along."
options:
thExcConvince:Convince the fleet commander to withdraw
cutCommLink:Cut the comm link

text:
The $post’s eyes widen in a sudden panic when you imply that the details of this secret operation have been made public. 

"All ships, break orbit! We're leaving!"

The comm link connection abruptly closes.

script:
TH_CMD excavationBombardMenu
SetStoryOption thExcTrick 1 thExcTrickDefenders ui_char_spent_story_point "Tricked excavation defenders into leaving fortifications"
text: Your survey teams report being harried by vengeful operatives from the $th_excavation_faction. They are dug into the ruins and will have to be dealt with before you can conduct a proper survey.
options:
thExcRaid:Raid the excavation site
thExcBombard:Prepare an orbital bombardment
thExcTrick:Convince the operatives to leave their fortifications
thExcGroundOpsGoBack:Go back

text:
You make contact with the $th_excavation_faction commander, who is initially hostile but quickly believes your lie that you are a $th_excavation_faction contractor fleet sent to evacuate them.

You instruct them to gather at an open space to await pickup while your crew prepares a bombardment of considerably smaller scale than what would have otherwise been required.

A transmission impatiently asking for the shuttle's ETA arrives just before the small flash of an antimatter explosion at the pickup site.
Your marines prepare to assault the $th_excavation_faction excavation site on the planet's surface. Resistance is expected from dug-in operatives and automated defenses.
Your fleet unleashes a sustained bombardment on the excavation site. When the dust settles, nothing remains of the operatives or whatever it was that they were defending.

You pull up a chair. The Clanners eye you warily at first, but the eldest among them, a scarred $manOrWoman with prosthetic fingers, seems to warm up after you buy a round of drinks. $He or she tells you about...
options:
thSalvorAccept:...an interesting opportunity to advance your Treasure Hunt.
thSalvorLeave:...some interesting but inconsequential gossip.

script: SetStoryOption thSalvorAccept 1 thSalvorClanTip ui_char_spent_story_point "Acquired a salvage lead from a Salvor Clan"

text: The Clanners lips have been thoroughly loosened by drink, and you take detailed mental notes of everything $heOrShe says. By the time you finish your drink, you have learned about a very interesting opportunity.
